# quad

**Instance Property**

The axis-aligned bounding rectangle represented by the node.

## Declaration

```swift
var quad: GKQuad { get }
```

## Discussion

You can use this rectangle to find elements in the tree with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKQuadtree/elements(in:)] method.
title: quad
